summary: During the Brookline Select Board meeting on March 31, 2026, a variety of topics were discussed, including updates on local activities and facilities, the importance of public health initiatives, and community services for seniors. The board addressed ongoing projects related to Fisher Hill, environmental concerns, and outreach for a ballot question regarding local funding initiatives. They emphasized the need for better communication strategies in the town and discussed funding opportunities related to public health and community services. The board also highlighted the significance of upcoming events to honor September 11, 2001. These discussions and decisions can be referenced in the transcript, notably around [16:13], [51:32], [108:36], [150:34], and [239:19].
title: Brookline Select Board Meeting - March 31, 2026
